$comment: REAL, public, room/scene-scale Gaussian-splat files referenced BY URL.
No binary splats are committed to this repo: raku-runtime's Git-LFS quota
is exhausted (see spatial-capture-plan.md section 7), so samples are remote.
Every url was verified with an HTTP HEAD / ranged GET on 2026-05-24:
each returns 200/206, access-control-allow-origin: *, and supports Range
requests, so the in-browser Spark viewer can stream them cross-origin.
bytes is the verified Content-Length at that time (may drift if re-hosted).
superSplatLoadable is true only for .ply: SuperSplat's ?load= URL param
is documented for .ply only, so the viewer's 'Clean up' button copies the
URL to the clipboard for .spz samples instead of deep-linking.

samples.label: Greyscale room
samples.description: A furnished room-scale interior scene - a good stand-in for the 'scan your living room' hero use case.
samples.source: World Labs - Forge / Marble public scene set (forge-dev-public GCS bucket); referenced by the Spark renderer's own examples manifest (examples/assets.json).
samples.license: Public sample asset distributed by World Labs for use with the MIT-licensed Spark renderer. Provided as a demo asset; treat as demo-only, not for redistribution as a product asset.

samples.label: Painted bedroom
samples.description: A room-scale bedroom capture - smaller download, faster first paint above the fold.
samples.source: World Labs - Forge public scene set (forge-dev-public GCS bucket); referenced by the Spark renderer's examples manifest (examples/assets.json).
samples.license: Public sample asset distributed by World Labs for use with the MIT-licensed Spark renderer. Demo-only.

samples.label: Fireplace nook
samples.description: A scene-scale interior (fireplace corner) - smallest sample, used as the lightweight fallback for the intro preview.
samples.source: Spark renderer project (sparkjsdev/spark) - official example asset hosted at sparkjs.dev, listed in examples/assets.json.
samples.license: Distributed as an example asset alongside the MIT-licensed Spark project. Demo-only.
